# New Reward

> New Reward is an AI-visibility agency that gets your business found, trusted, and recommended across Google Search and the major AI engines (Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity, Grok). We find the gaps, fix them, and show you weekly improvements — with proof you can inspect.

## What we do
- SEO and GEO (generative-engine optimization, also called AEO / answer-engine optimization)
- Content and intent mapping, CMS and syndication
- Reviews and reputation, distribution and lead response
- Paid advertising, AI automation, and inspectable reporting

## How it works
We score your visibility (0–100) across Google and AI, diagnose the ranked gaps, fix the highest-impact issues, and show weekly improvements. Pricing is a fixed monthly fee plus a share of new, attributable revenue above your baseline.

## Guarantee
A growth target calibrated to your market footprint and industry — measured in revenue (not leads), backed by inspectable proof of attribution.

## Key pages
- Home: https://pdrayday.github.io/newreward/

- Who we are (team): https://pdrayday.github.io/newreward/why-us.html

- Blog: https://pdrayday.github.io/newreward/pulse.html


## Key definitions
- SEO: classic search engine optimization — Google rankings, local Google Maps results, on-page work, content, and authority building.
- GEO (also called AEO): answer & generative engine optimization — becoming the business ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews recommend when customers ask.
- AI visibility score: a 0-100 score of how often AI assistants mention or recommend a business. Most local businesses score under 25.
- Lost revenue model: monthly searches x achievable click share x close rate x visibility gap x yearly customer value — computed conservatively (yearly customer value, never lifetime value).

## Tools
- Pricing & lost-revenue calculator: https://pdrayday.github.io/newreward-pricing-calculator/
